synopsis:
A non-canon "what if" retelling of *A New Hope* that diverges at the Battle of Yavin: Luke Skywalker's proton torpedoes malfunction and fail to destroy the Death Star. With the Rebel base overrun, the survivors are captured and imprisoned, but Princess Leia is taken to Coruscant, where Darth Vader quietly begins turning her to the dark side. Aboard the *Millennium Falcon*, a despairing Luke nearly cuts down Han Solo before the spirit of Obi-Wan Kenobi intervenes and sends him to Dagobah to train under Yoda.

Five years later, the Empire renames the Death Star the Justice Star, and Leia has become a powerful Sith Lady serving the dying Emperor. His training complete, Luke returns with Han and Chewbacca to strike at Coruscant. Yoda seizes control of the battle station and destroys the orbiting fleet while Luke and Han fight their way into the Emperor's palace. Ordered to duel, Leia takes up Vader's lightsaber against Luke, who refuses to kill her and instead reaches her by revealing that they are brother and sister, redeeming her from the dark side.
title: Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope
